name: AVB Interaction Layer
title: AVB Interaction Layer
tables: ETHERNET Only available with option .Ethernet. To use the CAPL functions the AVB_IL.DLL must be included.
Callback Functions Control Functions General Functions
Is dispatched when an asynchronous connection operation completes.
Is dispatched when a connection request for the specified Listener is received.
Is dispatched when an asynchronous receive operation on a Listener completes.
Is dispatched when an asynchronous send operation on a Talker completes.
Is called right before a packet will be sent by the gPTP stack.
Resumes AVB/TSN automatic message sending behavior after a previous suspension.
Checks whether the last called function of AVB IL has been successfully executed.
Retrieves the last error which occurs in the AVB IL as string.
Sets the properties to configure the behavior of the AVB IL.
Sets the verbosity level of AVB IL messages in the Write Window.
The behavior of the PTP layer can be configured using properties.
Returns the simulation timespan equivalent to the corresponding PTP timespan.
Returns the global PTP time corresponding to the simulation time.
Returns the current global PTP time.
Accepts an incoming connection request on the specified Listener resulting in a new Listener.
Causes the Listener to listen for incoming connection requests.
Creates a Listener for use in connection-based, message-oriented communications.
Receives data into the specified buffer.
Gets the media type for a Listener or a Talker.
Retrieves the bit depth of an AAF sample in the stream received by the Listener or originated by the Talker.
Retrieves the Stream Identifier (ID) of the Listener or Talker.
Retrieves the stream’s Source Address of the Listener or Talker.
Retrieves the stream’s Unique Identifier (ID) of the Listener or Talker as part of the Stream Identifier (ID).
Establishes a connection with the specified location.
Creates a Talker for use in connection-based, message-oriented communications.
Receives data into the specified buffer.
Sets the media type for a Talker.
Sets the AVTP protocol of the Talker.
